final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a feminine beauty skincare brand.

Style/medium: needs a "clean, bright, airy, feminine, floral" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 2010s Japanese 美容 magazine editorial layout, Glossier early DTC web design language, Korean 뷰티 brand soft minimalism; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a three-column hero layout (left copy column / center model / right product column) with a header bar above and a bottom benefit-card row below
Subject: must include all of the following:
  Header — logo wordmark "LUMEA BEAUTY", 5 navigation links ["特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ"], CTA button "今すぐ試す"
  Left column — headline "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", subheadline "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", 3 pill-shaped feature badges with small icons ["敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える"], 3 bullet points with pink checkmarks ["美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア"], 2 CTA buttons ["初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >"], trust-badge line "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし"
  Center — young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
  Right column — moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle + packaging box (product display), 3 floating white rounded-rectangle stat cards with gold accents ["満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破"]
  Bottom row — 3 horizontal white rounded-rectangle benefit cards with icons ["うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"]
Scene/backdrop: must include a light, airy white-to-soft-pink gradient background with purple floral accent elements scattered decoratively
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, diffused, bright feminine mood — exact light source treatment is yours
Color palette: must be soft pink and white dominant, with purple flower accents and gold detail highlights
Materials/textures: needs a clean digital UI surface feel with subtle soft shadows on cards and floating elements — exact texture execution is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "LUMEA BEAUTY" (logo), "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ" (nav), "今すぐ試す" (nav CTA), "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。" (headline), "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。" (subheadline), "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える" (badges), "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア" (bullets), "初回限定で試してみる >" / "成分をチェック >" (CTAs), "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし" (trust line), "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破" (stat cards), "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ" (benefit cards)
Constraints: must render as a full desktop webpage mockup with all UI sections visible and legible; all Japanese text must be preserved verbatim
Avoid: dark backgrounds, masculine tones, cluttered layout, missing text elements
